name_en: 5BF131, New Miu style shell backpack, exquisite and delicate glossy calfskin, simple lines combined with runway inspiration and modern feminine temperament, balancing style experimentation and exquisite diversity, the bag has multiple wearing ways: single shoulder, handbag, crossbody, backpack, presenting a versatile retro style, continuing Miu's unconventional, bold innovation, lazy yet natural and free-spirited style, distinct personality, capable of handling various styles, an excellent choice for work, commuting, or shopping

Size: 24 X 14 X8.5 cm
